lightsaber.text:
SW5E LIGHTSABER MODULAR SYSTEM — FULL
PLAYER VERSION
Crystal-Based Scaling Edition
Crystal Scaling Rule
Tier 1 Crystal fi +1 damage die per Saber Tier
Tier 2 Crystal fi +2 damage dice per Saber Tier
Tier 3 Crystal fi +3 damage dice per Saber Tier
Total Damage Formula: (X + C×T)dY + any bonus dice from mods or enhancements.

LIGHTSABER CRYSTALS — FULL SCALING (T1, T2,
T3 SEPARATED)
Tier 1 Crystals
Crystal Effect
Blue (T1) Reroll 1 missed attack (SR). Adds +1 damage die per saber tier.
Green (T1) +2 to the first Concentration check. Adds +1 damage die per saber tier.
Yellow (T1) Advantage vs hidden/invisible. Adds +1 damage die per saber tier.
Orange (T1) Advantage on Insight (social). Adds +1 damage die per tier.
Red (T1) +10 damage (LR). Adds +1 damage die per tier.
Purple (T1) Adv Insight vs Force-users. Adds +1 damage die per tier.
Tier 2 Crystals
Crystal Effect
Blue (T2) +1d6 first hit/turn. Adds +2 damage dice per saber tier.
Green (T2) +1d4 force/turn. Adds +2 damage dice per tier.
Yellow (T2) +2 initiative; radiant crits. Adds +2 dice per tier.
Orange (T2) +1d4 Persuasion; min 10. Adds +2 dice per tier.
Red (T2) +1d6 necrotic/turn; heal 2. Adds +2 dice per tier.
Purple (T2) +1d8 force/SR. Adds +2 dice per tier.

Tier 3 Crystals
Crystal Effect
Blue (T3) +1d10 on crit; +1 AC. Adds +3 damage dice per tier.
Green (T3) PB to Concentration. Adds +3 dice per tier.
Yellow (T3) Cannot be surprised. Adds +3 dice per tier.
Orange (T3) Neutralize hostiles; Persuasion expertise. Adds +3 dice per tier.
Red (T3) +2d6 necrotic/turn; restore FP. Adds +3 dice per tier.
Purple (T3) Ignore resistance. Adds +3 dice per tier.

LIGHTSABER ENHANCEMENTS — SIX OPTIONS
PER TIER
Tier 1 Enhancements
Enhancement Effect
Stabilization Matrix (T1) Reduce crit-fail chance.
Heat Vent (T1) +1d4 once/turn.
Insulated Wiring (T1) Advantage vs disarm.
Basic Dual-Phase (T1) 10 ft reach (1 round).
Anti-Armor (T1) +3 vs droids/armor.
Energy Bypass (T1) +1 damage vs shields.
Tier 2 Enhancements
Enhancement Effect
Refined Power Cell (T2) +1d8/SR.
Hyper-Resonance (T2) +1d10 crit.
Force Pulse (T2) 1d4 when hit.
Advanced Dual-Phase (T2) Free reach mode.
Overload Regulator (T2) +2 damage if you spent FP this turn.
Stability Bracket (T2) +1 to hit if you haven't moved.
Tier 3 Enhancements
Enhancement Effect
Perfect Power Core (T3) +1d6 every hit.
Ionic Harmonics (T3) Ignore resist/immunity (1/SR).
Photon Edge (T3) Cuts like adamantine.
Force Matrix (T3) +4 reaction to Force/Concentration.
Supercharged Dual-Phase (T3) +2d6 first reach hit.
Quantum Channel (T3) Once per turn, add +PB damage of chosen type.

LIGHTSABER MODS — SIX OPTIONS PER TIER
Tier 1 Mods
Mod Effect
Emitter Guard (T1) +1 AC vs melee.
Counterweight (T1) Adv Acrobatics.
Focusing Lens (T1) 1 advantaged attack (SR).
Perceptive Module (T1) +1 Wis; adv Perception.
Agile Coupling (T1) +1 Dex; +1 init.
Micro-Servo Actuator (T1) +1 to hit if dual wielding.
Tier 2 Mods
Mod Effect
Crossguard Stabilizer (T2) +1d6 reaction damage.
Kinetic Loop (T2) +2 dmg after parry/deflect.
Ocular Scope (T2) +2 to hit w/ disadvantage.
Mag-Seal (T2) Only disarmed on crit.
Evasion Gyroscope (T2) +1 Dex; shift 5 ft on miss.
Targeting Subprocessor (T2) +1 damage on all off-hand attacks.
Tier 3 Mods
Mod Effect
Inquisitor Disk (T3) AoE 3d8 (1/SR).
Phantom Edge (T3) Add PB force dmg (1/turn).
Auto-Parry Routine (T3) +2 AC vs one attack.
Synergy Matrix (T3) Crit fi ally attack.
Dual-Channel Conductor (T3) +1d6 force when dual wield.
Overclocked Processor (T3) +1 attack roll per turn (not an extra attack).

LIGHTSABER HILTS — SIX OPTIONS PER TIER
Tier 1 Hilts
Hilt Effect
Standard (T1) Balanced.
Shoto (T1) +1 off-hand dmg.
Extended Grip (T1) +5 ft shove.
Artisan Wrap (T1) Adv Persuasion vs Force-users.
Guarded Emitter (T1) +1 AC (two-handed).
Ventilated Pommel (T1) +1 initiative.
Tier 2 Hilts
Hilt Effect
Curved Makashi (T2) +2 hit (Dex melee).
Dual-Emitter (T2) +1d6 vs grappled.
Balance-Core (T2) +2 initiative.
Ataru Leaping (T2) +1d8 after 10 ft move.
Defender Hilt (T2) +2 AC after Dodge.
Crushguard Lattice (T2) +1 damage vs large creatures.
Tier 3 Hilts
Hilt Effect
Ancient Jedi (T3) +2 dmg; heal 2d8 (LR).
Sith Warforged (T3) +2d6 necrotic/turn.
Crossguard Master (T3) Reaction attack on miss.
Double-Saber (T3) Bonus action strike.
Force-Conductive (T3) +2 Force DC.
Echo Resonance Frame (T3) +PB to first attack each combat.

Crystal Effect
Blue (T1) Reroll 1 missed attack (SR). +1 damage die per tier.
Green (T1) +2 to first Concentration check. +1 damage die per tier.
Yellow (T1) Advantage vs hidden/invisible. +1 damage die per tier.
Orange (T1) Advantage on Insight (social). +1 damage die per tier.

Purple (T1) Adv Insight vs Force-users. +1 damage die per tier.
Tier 2 Crystals
Crystal Effect
Blue (T2) +1d6 first hit/turn. +2 damage dice per tier.
Green (T2) +1d4 force/turn. +2 damage dice per tier.
Yellow (T2) +2 initiative; radiant crits. +2 dice per tier.
Orange (T2) +1d4 Persuasion; min 10. +2 dice per tier.
Red (T2) +1d6 necrotic/turn; heal 2. +2 dice per tier.
Purple (T2) +1d8 force/SR. +2 dice per tier.
Tier 3 Crystals
Crystal Effect

Orange (T3) Neutralize hostiles; Persuasion expertise. +3 dice per tier.
Red (T3) +2d6 necrotic/turn; restore FP. +3 dice per tier.
Purple (T3) Ignore resistance. +3 dice per tier.
Power Cell Mods — Tier 1
Mod Effect
Overcharged Cell +1 damage.

Balanced Power Cell +1 to hit.
Pulse-Regulator Cell Reroll 1 damage die once/turn.
Thermal Buffer Cell Reduce misfire chance by 1.
Compact Efficiency Cell +1 damage on your first hit/turn.
Conduction Stabilizer Treat 1 on damage dice as 2.
Power Cell Mods — Tier 2
Mod Effect
Cycling Surge Cell +2 dice to one attack (SR).
Harmonic Output Cell +1d8 crit damage.
Dual-Phase Capacitor Add +1 die once per turn.
Ion-Shift Capacitor Ignore resistance to energy/ion.
High-Drain Feed +1 AC after hitting.
Reverb Pulse Cell Miss fi +1 die on next hit this turn.
Power Cell Mods — Tier 3
Mod Effect
Quantum Channel Array +PB damage once/turn.
Supercharged Phase Cell +2d6 on first hit each turn.
Perfect Energy Core +1d6 damage on every hit.
Ionic Harmonics Matrix Ignore resistance + immunity (1/SR).
Photon Loadout Cell One attack deals max damage.
Cascade Overdrive Core Drop a target fi bonus-action blaster attack.
Firing Module Mods — Tier 1
Mod Effect
Rapid-Cycle Module +1 damage die once/turn.
Stabilized Discharge Reroll 1 damage die.
Short-Haul Burst Module +1 to hit within 30 ft.
Pulse Breaker +1 damage vs targets in cover.
Micro-Repeater Node Once/turn, treat a 2 as a 3 on damage.

Low-Recoil Chamber +1 AC after firing.
Firing Module Mods — Tier 2
Mod Effect
Burst-Fire Module 10 ft cone (SR).
Repeater Linkage Extra attack (SR).
Piercing Beam Matrix +2 to hit at long range.
Stun Pulse Generator Con save stun (SR).
Adaptive Spread Module Cone attacks deal +1 die.
Shatter-Cycle Module +1d6 vs shields or droids.
Firing Module Mods — Tier 3
Mod Effect
Overclocked Repeater Array +1 attack roll per turn.
Wide-Angle Disruptor 25 ft line attack (SR).
Cascade Burst Engine Hit two adjacent targets for half damage.
Perfected Beam Synchronizer Crits auto-hit second target.
Stormfire Lattice Three attacks per turn once (LR).
Ionstorm Ventilator First hit each fight ignores AC bonus from cover.
Targeting Array Mods — Tier 1
Mod Effect
Micro-Calibration Array +1 hit.
Precision Optics Advantage 1/ SR.
Gyro-Lock Array Ignore long-range disadvantage once/turn.
Thermal Sight +1 to hit vs invisible/hidden.
Target-Line Indicator First shot each turn adds +1 damage.
Ocular Stabilizer +1 initiative.
Targeting Array Mods — Tier 2

Mod Effect
Auto-Lock Sequence +1 crit range.
Predictive Targeting AI Auto-hit (10+mods) 1/SR.
Multi-Spectrum Targeter Ignore light obscurement.
Motion-Track Array +2 to hit if target moved this turn.
Thermal Imaging Array Ignore invisibility (SR).
Harmonic Rangefinder +1d6 damage beyond 30 ft.
Targeting Array Mods — Tier 3
Mod Effect
Quantum Sight Processor Once/turn, add PB to hit.
Perfected Optics Engine Crits auto-deal max dice.
Omni-Lock AI All attacks ignore cover.
Spectral Analyzer +2d6 radiant/energy vs hidden foes.
Apex Tracking Suite Gain advantage for entire turn (1/SR).
Refractor Pulse Sensor First miss each fight becomes a hit.
Cooling Jacket Mods — Tier 1
Mod Effect
Thermal Suppression Resist malfunction.
Quiet-Vent Jacket Adv stealth.
Vent Surge +1 initiative.
Cryo-Flow Lines Reduce fire damage by 2.
Heat-Bleed Mesh Shots produce no visible muzzle flash.
Overheat Buffer Reroll nat 1 on attack.
Cooling Jacket Mods — Tier 2
Mod Effect
Shock-Dispersion Jacket Reduce lightning damage by 5.
Phase-Coolant Tubing +1 AC after being hit.

Mag-Pressure Jacket +2 Dex saves.
Silent-Vector Shroud Attacks cannot be reacted to (1/SR).
Frostline Core +1d6 cold on crits.
Heat Vent Matrix Reduce overheat cooldown by 1.
Cooling Jacket Mods — Tier 3
Mod Effect
Perfect Coolant Core Immunity to misfire.
Ghostfire Jacket Attacks cannot be tracked (invisible muzzle).
Cryo-Overload Lattice +2d6 cold once/turn.
Thermal Nullifier Ignore fire/heat terrain effects.
Phase-Shift Jacket Once/turn reduce damage taken by PB.
Zero-Point Coolant Engine Cooldowns refresh twice as fast.
Grip Mods — Tier 1
Mod Effect
Ergonomic Grip +1 hit.
Weighted Grip +1 damage.
Counterweight Grip +1 AC.
Recoil Grip Ignore recoil penalty.
Quick-Draw Grip Free draw/stow.
Sniper’s Grip Adv first attack each combat.
Grip Mods — Tier 2
Mod Effect
Dual-Channel Grip Bonus-action attack (SR).
Adaptive Grip +1 Dex or Wis.
Stability Grip +2 to Dex saves.
Rebound Grip Once/turn add +1d4 to damage.
Crush-Hold Tactical Grip +1d6 damage vs large creatures.
Phase-Grip Anchor Cannot be disarmed except on crit.

Grip Mods — Tier 3
Mod Effect
Ancient Marksman Frame +2 damage.
Hunter-Killer Grip +PB damage on first hit each combat.
Overwatch Master Grip Free reaction attack 1/SR.
Echo Stabilizer Grip Add +2 to hit when you haven't moved.
Apex Gunner’s Grip Crits restore 1d4 HP.
High-Conductive Frame +2 to Force/Tech DCs (if applicable).
